Master, choose one from here to add to your hand +v+

注释: Except for [Select Skin], [SFW SKIN], and [NSFW SKIN], they are grouped in pairs. The first is the skin name, the second is the skin id (which is the name of the skin folder).
The ones below [SFW SKIN] are SFW skins, the ones below [NSFW SKIN] are NSFW skins.
NSFW skins need to have the option turned on in the settings to unlock (requires restart).
